Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ann Grimaldi, Esq. of Grimaldi Law Offices, Tel: 415.463.5186, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative on DEFENDANT HOMEWERKS WORLDWIDE, LLC's Motion To Modify Consent Judgment as follows: Defendant Homewerks Worldwide, LLC's motion to modify consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Defendant to submit an amended judgment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
